entries.title: Cargo fingerprinting trap: git checkout does not update file mtimes — cargo build is a no-op after branch switch
Bug fix verification: tokio runtime nesting panic in async tool handler
Avoid multi-filter git show pipelines — use git show SHA:path or git diff instead
Batch bugfix sessions must establish a clean worktree from main before spawning work agents
